category_sources: source_facts.description says it formats/translates text files to numerous formats; official homepage describes AsciiDoc as text-based document generation for notes, documentation, articles, books, web pages, and man pages.
display_name_sources: Official homepage identifies the software as AsciiDoc and distinguishes the Python implementation as AsciiDoc.py; source_facts.name is asciidoc.
docs_sources: Official AsciiDoc.py homepage navigation links to User Guide and Installation pages.
repo_sources: Official AsciiDoc.py installation page says the repository is hosted on GitHub at github.com/asciidoc/asciidoc-py3; homepage directs bug reports and PRs to the asciidoc-py3 repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists asciidoc and a2x CLI commands; source_facts.description and official homepage describe document translation and text document generation.
